text:
(In reply to zivillian from comment #16)
Here I have a tip on download video on. I can download dance video via tiktok but how can I download it without watermark? I prefer install [shareitmod](HTTP://www.shareitmod.com)  app for my Android rather than other app that enables users to download tiktok video without watermark!  [Downloader](HTTP://www.shareitmod.com)
